programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Red. An excitable Red arrives in Colourland. Learn about the colour red.
Puffin Practice. Oona tries to teach Baba how to be a grown-up puffin.
Leaf Pictures. Bing and his friends are making leaf pictures, but the wind whisks Coco's picture off the table! Bing catches it by stamping on her picture, and now Coco is angry.
The Big Beanbag Bash Day. Love Monster is jealous of the attention Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny gets at a sports event.
Pie Party. Wilf calls the Piggies to keep them busy and steal their pie.
Hoofcuffed. Baby coconuts fall and learn to walk on sand. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes help one that's struggling.
Banana. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Banana revealing an astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.
Got Your Goat. How hard can it be to pick one plant at the top of a mountain with Mojo's chopper top? Pretty hard when there's a hungry goat who wants that plant even more than they do!
The Mighty Koko. Koko gets a hydraulic power booster upgrade to make her super strong. Her newfound strength brings disastrous consequences for Chuggington.
Pea Repeats. Supertato is due to receive  the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.
Nature Explorer. Children's animation. Bing and his friends play nature explorers in Amma's garden by spinning a giant colour wheel and then finding something of that colour.
Names. Pando has an earworm, and Bing isn't impressed.
The Ambition Badge. The Squirrels learn how to achieve their ambitions.
The Rainbow Badge. The Squirrels see a rainbow for the very first time, but it disappears so quickly! Together they decide to create a rainbow themselves from everything around them.
Monteverde Cloud Forest, Costa Rica. The Go Jetters are in trouble when Glitch's feather collecting mission goes wrong.
The Tale of Cotton-Tail's New Friend. Animated series. Peter must scour the woods and find his sister Cotton-tail before a hungry Old Brown does.
Octonauts and the Poison Dart Frogs. Animated deep sea adventure series. The Octonauts must avoid the poison dart frogs who live in trees above the Amazon river.
Koa's Sweet Tooth. When Koa the tiger's teeth hurt, Vida discovers bacteria in his mouth from all the sweets he has been eating.
Mojo Drop the Ball. Mojo and Bo's wrecking ball might destroy a lot more than it's supposed to!
AstroBurp. My AstroBurp Challenge is ready for launch! We'll blast through squats, star jumps and burpees. Final destination: the Activate!
Growing. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Mr Tumble helps Grandad Tumble water his vegetables, and Justin and his friends have fun gardening and making a scarecrow.
Shops. Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!
The Decider. The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game!
The Soap Opera Badge. After accidentally breaking the Chickens' TV aerial, the Squirrels recreate the final episode of their favourite soap opera.
The Mythical Creature Badge. The Squirrels find a hidden book about mythical creatures.
Piri-O-UFO. Nugget adopts a lost mini alien as a pet until the gang convince her to let it go home.
One Whole Year. It's been one year since Cosima crash landed on Proxima, but no-one else has remembered this anniversary! Can a perfect picnic jolt their memories?
Beached. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes help a beached Watermelonsuchus into the water during a heatwave.
The Continent of Africa. Glitch and Tala get lost in Africa. Can the Go Jetters find them in this huge continent?
Mission Pirates. The ducklings pretend to be pirates, but Weasy won't play fair.
Dinosaurs on the Loose/WEB-STER's Big Bad Bug. The villains turn into dinos. WEB-STER turns evil.
Atmospheric River. Paani and Min use the new Octoblimp to map a 'river in the sky'.
Can-Bots. Stan is needed for many jobs, so he creates three special robots called Can-Bots to help him. When they get out of control, he steps in to stop them.
To Catch a Button. Supertato promises Raisin that he will keep her most precious button, Princess Bella Bob, safe. But Evil Pea plans to take it to ruin Supertato's reputation.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Suddenly Controlled. Professor Kranium hacks into Tom's supersuit.
Musical Show. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes sing and dance their way across the stage in a show-stopping musical number.
Dusty, Old Box. A dusty, old box makes Rebecca sneeze! Murphi dreams up some make ideas to help reveal what's inside, including a tissue box monster and a flamingo sock puppet.
Hatty the Hedgehog. The chefs are having a scavenger hunt in the cafe, finding spiky things.
Wind Sounds and Sandcastles Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers make wind sounds and find a mermaid's purse on a walk to make sandcastles.
Tenrec and Tarantula. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the tenrec and a tarantula called Kate.
Waffle and the Marching Band. Waffle's smelliness threatens his role in a marching band sing along for Mr Nolan.
The Spider Badge. Animated preschool series. The Squirrels are playing in the clubhouse when Norrie discovers a spider in the dressing-up box.
Mimic Octopus. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts recruit a shape-shifting mimic octopus to help them on a mission.
Tidbit's Thirsty Day. When Tidbit gets dehydrated, Vida helps him to play and hydrate at the same time.
Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. Animated adventure comedy series. Someone's stopped the samba at the Rio carnival! Can the Go Jetters fix the glitch?
The Talk to Animals Wish. Rafi's wish to talk to animals causes confusion. She realises real magic is listening when she helps a sparrow find its family.
The Fly Past. On migration day, the gang try to find the right sound to get a response from the geese.
Banana. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Banana revealing yet another astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.
Patchwork Chick. Patchwork Chick has a problem: nobody wants to play with him because he is so small! But aren't there even smaller Patchwork Pals around who also want to play?
Cinema. Justin and his friends visit the cinema to watch a very special funny film. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble directs his own film with a little help from all of his toys!
Technology. Toddlers and their grown-ups explore technology things, sing songs and share a story.
The Bravest Thing. When Lou is attacked by a bully, he bravely retaliates with a song.
Banananuts Harvest. The Piggies harvest banananuts, and Wilf offers to help...
Zigzag's Skating Booboo. Zigzag is surprised to find she can't rollerskate as fast as she usually runs.
Can-Bots. Stan is needed for many jobs, so he creates three special robots called Can-Bots to help him. When they get out of control, he steps in to stop them.
The Origasaurus. The Game Catchers land on the Origami Planet to play rock paper scissors.
Ball Heist. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes lose their ball near sleeping Cucumberdiles. A quiet retrieval fails.
Waffle's Hoopla. Waffle's first day at after-school club includes a hoop hunt and hoopla stage performance.
Trees. Adrian, Mia and Aaron go on a 'tree-mendous' garden adventure to discover the magical powers of trees.
Gor-don the Great Unleashed. Tom and his friends go to the museum. They meet a new villain called Gor-don the Great!   Followed by Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest.
Andy and the Lost Pachycephalosaurus. Andy embarks on an adventure across Dino Island in search of a baby Pachycephalosaurus.
The Dough Blob. Evil Pea makes a giant dough blob so that she can take over the supermarket. The Tato Team must use some baking know-how to save the day.
Do-Re-Mi. Mae and Aimee teach Leapy how to put together a tune using simple notes mixed up as they perform the Sound of Music's iconic song, 'Do Re Mi'.
Toby's Blurry Blunders. When Toby has trouble catching a ball, Vida gives him an eye exam and learns he needs glasses.
How to Work Together. Dad shares his explorer notebook with Cosima and Big Lizard.
The Do It All Wish. Rafi's wish to be in two places at once leads to mix-ups. She realises it's better to focus on one thing at a time.
Army. Jack's the new dog at school and the newest recruit in Rusty's army. Jack struggles with following instructions and always forgets his hat, but Rusty will make a soldier of him yet.
It's Time to Check the Weather Forecast. A rainy weather forecast threatens JoJo's plans to slide down the big slide at the park.
Fancy Park. When their local park is closed, Sarah and Duck try to find a suitable alternative.
I Want to Be Much More Bigger Like You. Children's animation with the siblings. Lola is too small to ride the Loop-the-Looper at the fair and tries everything to make herself taller.
Dibillo's Bow Tie. Dibillo decides to wear his favourite bow tie for the day. Mr Onion is excited and takes Dibillo around the house to show everybody how smart he looks.
MeMo's Messy Painting. MeMo is frustrated with a messy painting. BaBa and friends help MeMo see its beauty.
Igglepiggle's Accident. Children's show. Igglepiggle discovers the stones which Makka Pakka has carefully tidied into a special pattern, but then he accidentally knocks them over.
Nikita Kanda - Little Lion Girl. Nikita Kanda reads an inspirational story of a little girl regaining her roar and bravery on a journey to the big city.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Blue. Cool Blue arrives in Colourland. Learn about the colour blue.
The Mystery Egg. Oona, Baba and Mossy babysit a little egg and help find its mama and papa.
Fire Engine. Bing doesn't get to sit in the fire engine but later gets to help out when Arlo is stuck.
Road Trip Day. Love Monster and Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny take a trip out of Fluffytown in the carrot car.
Egg Race. Kitty wants to bounce like Sasha, so the Piggies create an egg-shaped vehicle for her. But Wilf makes it go wild and it's now a chase to stop it!
Egg Drop. Ginger and the Peas help a Bokchoydactyl retrieve its egg from a nest of Cucumberdiles.
Pumpkin. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength.
The Chickening. Carrying a giant chicken to the country fair proves trickier than Mojo and Bo expected!
The Fast, the Strong and the Wilson. Wilson goes for the gold to find out what he's best at as all of Chuggington is celebrating and competing in the Chuggtastic Games!
Da Veggie Code. Supertato needs his Tato belt, but it's locked inside a glass case and he can't get it out.
Eggy Head. Children's animation. At Amma's creche the children make eggy heads with egg shells and cress seeds. Bing knows his Eggy needs time to grow 'hair' but waiting is hard.
Camping. Sula and Bing go camping to see the night sky. But then Bing sees a scary shadow...
The Egg Badge. Animated preschool series. One of the chickens is laying her eggs. One chick, two chicks and OOPS! Oh dear, the third chick is a little bit stuck!
The Dream Badge. Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about dreams and what they can mean.
The Continent of Europe. The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.
The Tale of the Lost Ladybird. Animated series. When Peter accidentally loses Lily's ladybird, the rabbits embark on a dangerous chase to recover her precious pet.
Octonauts and the Hidden Lake. Animated deep sea adventure series. In Antarctica, Shellington discovers strange microscopic creatures living under the ice.
Juno's Bubble Bath Breakout. Juno gets sticky from tree sap, so Vida needs to give her a bubble bath - but she's nervous!
Joist Hoist. Swoppiton Bridge is falling down - can Mojo and Bo help Nori fix it in time?
Back to School. Get your body and brain buzzing to study again with my Back-to-School Challenge! Do arm circles, push-ups and star jumps, then add it all together in the Activate!
Family. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Mr Tumble takes a family photograph for his album, while Justin spends the day with a family.
Wagon Ride. Dad takes Bluey and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park.
Cubby. Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy, Kimjim.
The Counting Badge. The Squirrels try the ultimate achievement of counting to 100.
The What Happened Badge. The Squirrels try and tell us what has just happened.
Zog and Gadabout try to rescue Princess Pearl, who has been locked up in her uncle's castle. Based on the book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler.
Go Jetter Heroes: Polar Explorers. Kyan and Glitch race to the South Pole in this chilly Antarctic adventure.
Mission Swimming Pool. The ducklings blame Weasy for destroying their swimming pool when they wanted to cool off.
Groundhog's Day Out/Ploofy Power. Villains steal the city's groundhog. Zola steals toys.
Red Tide. Harmful algae create a red tide on the Florida coast, causing creatures to get sick.
Sophie Can Do. Sophie's beloved dino costume has been washed and is drying on the line. Without it, she feels less confident.
The Big Supermarket Game Show. Supertato goes head-to-head with Evil Pea on Banana's Big Supermarket Game Show, but Evil Pea plans to cheat her way to winning a speedboat.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Suddenly Stuck. Kranium's airship gets stuck between two buildings. Should the Heroes rescue her?
Art. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. In this blues song, the Potatoes enter famous paintings and sculptures, celebrating different ways art is created.
Teddy Bears' Picnic. It's the annual Teddy Bear Party, but before that, a toadstool pot, some paper cup critter puppets and a teddy bear box are created in attic.
Walter the Wizard. The chefs want to eat ice cream, but the freezer is too cold to go near.
Easter. Follow Liberty as she celebrates the Christian holiday of Easter by going on a chocolate egg hunt, visiting church and enjoying a lovely picnic.
Spectacled Bear and Tiger. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the spectacled bear and the tiger.
Waffle's Magic. Mrs Hobbs thinks she's magicked Waffle the Wonder Dog away, but Waffle is on an adventure of his own, sniffing for a biscuit backstage.
The We Love Animals Badge. Animated preschool series. When Duggee strokes Enid the cat, the Squirrels want to find animals they can stroke too.
Lionfish. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts get more than they bargained for with a pair of invasive lionfish.
Otto's Crampy Conundrum. Otto keeps getting cramp while teaching dance class, so Vida teaches him to stretch.
Mount Everest, Asia. Animated adventure comedy series. Kyan wants to climb Mount Everest, but there's a giant snowball heading his way - and it's got a moustache!
The Multi Rafi Wish. Rafi's wish makes four colourful Rafis appear. She decides to organise each Rafi so that they focus on one job each before merging back into one.
Radio Stripes. Yukee and Stripes set up their own garden radio station but struggle to find music that keeps their audience happy.
Avocado. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fabulous Avocados singing an operatic piece in their three unique voices!
Eye Test. Justin and his friends learn all about getting their eyes tested. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble helps Grandad Tumble with some new glasses when he loses his old pair.
Birthday Song. Sarah, Duck and all of their friends sing an extended version of the birthday song!
Recycling. Nigel, Benjee Bear and Bailee Bear invite toddlers and their grown-ups to explore recycling things through play, song and story. Little ones and grown-ups at home can play too!
Uncle Lou. Lou babysits some squawking little birds who drive him crazy.
Bunny Wheel. The Piggies rebuild a big wheel, but the instructions are missing. While Cesar searches, Charlie and Cornelia start building anyway. What could go wrong?
Daphne's Sore Ears. Daphne is upset when her sparkly clip-on earrings start to hurt her ears.
Sophie Can Do. Sophie's beloved dino costume has been washed and is drying on the line. Without it, she feels less confident.
How Creaky! The Game Catchers land on a planet with funny creatures to play full sack, empty sack.
Night Lights. A lost baby Bokchoydaktyl is guided down to safety by Ginger and the Pea-Rexes, with help from some light-up Vegesaurs.
Waffle and the Dressing-Up Box. Waffle finds the club's dressing-up box full of animal costumes - what will he choose?
Tidying Up. James, Noah and Aaron are on a mission to tidy up the city centre garden for a party. They work alongside Chatterpot's friends - a rake, a spade and Wheely the wheelbarrow.
A Tale of Two Heroes. The Rakoonz disguise themselves as the Peak City Heroes and wreak havoc around the city.
Wild Meadow. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on a mini quest to make their own wild meadows.
Andy and the Quetzalcoatlus Egg. Andy embarks on an epic adventure across Dino Island to return a Quetzalcoatlus egg back to its nest and reunite it with its family before it hatches.
Dangle Disaster. Evil Pea has set a trap for the Tatocar but gets herself and Corn trapped instead.
Over the Rainbow. Sheba transforms into a magical rainbow as Aimee and Mae perform the famous Over the Rainbow from the Wizard of Oz, in British Sign Language accompanied by animations.
Fergie's Horrible Hiccups. When Fergie gets hiccups before her concert, Vida needs to come up with a preshow cure!
When We Lost D.O.R.I.S.'s Brain. A creature takes D.O.R.I.S.'s brain, so Cosima and Big Lizard chase it into the forest.
The Tallest Wish. Seeing herself small in a family photo makes Rafi wish to be taller. She realises growing up fast isn't necessary, and the best memories are made together.
Easter. Bluey finds a series of clues that lead the girls on an Easter egg treasure hunt.
It's Time for an Easter Feast. Easter means it's time for JoJo, Gran Gran and all the family to have a special feast!
Pipe Conductor. Animation. Sarah and Duck are woken up by a loud clanging overhead and decide to investigate the noise.
My Little Town. Children's animation about a pair of siblings who deal with everyday topics. Sharing a My Little Town play set proves to be a challenge for Charlie and Lola.
Moon Baby in the Tub! Everybody is quietly reading books when the little toy tub appears.
Mud. MeMo and BaBa find some fun and safe ways to play with glorious mud: stomping in puddles, making pies in a mud kitchen and planting some seeds with the Yummies.
Upsy Daisy Kisses Everything. Series for young children. Upsy Daisy loves the garden so much that she kisses everything around her. When she kisses things, magic starts to happen.
Rev. Kate Bottley - It's Mine. Kate Bottley reads a story about a special something that everyone believes is theirs.
